metadata.scope_note: Nigeria v1 sector overlay pack. Use together with core_control_library for baseline privacy, cybersecurity, governance, evidence, and human-review controls.
metadata.versioning_note: This is a frozen starter snapshot. Do not mutate after use in reports; publish v2025_02 or later for changes.

official_sources_consulted.name: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners 2023
Rules of Professional Conduct 2007 official judiciary copy
NBA notice on AML/CFT provisions for legal practitioners

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Nigerian laws, regulations, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.

rules.title: Client confidentiality and privilege controls are documented
rules.summary: Law-firm documents should evidence client confidentiality, legal professional privilege, privileged communication, or file confidentiality controls.

source_basis: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: AML/CFT risk controls for legal practice are referenced
rules.summary: Legal-practice documents should evidence AML/CFT controls where the practice performs covered transactional, corporate, real-estate, trust, or financial services.

source_basis: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners 2023
NBA AML/CFT notice for legal practitioners
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Client due diligence or conflict/risk onboarding is documented
rules.summary: Law-firm intake documents should evidence client identification, onboarding due diligence, conflict checks, or source-of-funds review where applicable.

source_basis: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners 2023
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Engagement terms or retainer evidence is present
rules.summary: Law-firm service documents should evidence engagement terms, retainer, scope of work, fees, or client authorization.

source_basis: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Conflict-of-interest management is documented
rules.summary: Law-firm policies should evidence conflict checks, conflict disclosure, consent, or matter-screening controls.

source_basis: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Personal-data processing for clients/matters is documented
rules.summary: Law-firm documents should evidence privacy notice, lawful basis, data-subject rights, data retention, or data security for client and matter data.

source_basis: NDPC Nigeria Data Protection Act GAID 2025
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Secure handling of electronic client files is documented
rules.summary: Legal-practice documents should evidence security controls for electronic client files, access control, encryption, secure storage, or incident handling.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Practice authorization or lawyer eligibility evidence is present
rules.summary: Law-practice documents should evidence legal-practice authorization, call-to-bar status, practising certificate, NBA branch, or firm registration where relevant.

source_basis: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Client complaint or grievance process is referenced
rules.summary: Client-facing law-firm materials should evidence complaints, grievance handling, escalation, or client communication process.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Client money/trust account controls are referenced where applicable
rules.summary: Law-firm financial documents should evidence client money, trust account, disbursement, reconciliation, or segregation controls where applicable.

source_basis: Rules of Professional Conduct for Legal Practitioners
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.
